name: Diving milestone check
description: Monthly warm dive digest plus milestone state updates when triggers fire.

prompts.prompt: Follow .cursor/automations/diving-milestone-check.prompt.md exactly. Use the warm monthly dive digest format, validate .cursor/automations/last-milestone-nudge.txt with scripts/validate-milestone-nudge.sh, then send with scripts/send-telegram.sh. Do not use the old dry audit format or start with "Diving milestones". Keep memory disabled for this automation.
